item.name: Flying Cumulus Seed
item.description: The incantation on this enchanted scroll is believed to birth a wondrous cloud, lighter than air, yet solid enough to bear a rider.

mount.name: Flying Cumulus
mount.action: Summon forth the flying cumulus. It is unclear whether its previous owner was a boy with a tail or simply a monkey.
mount.description: There is but one man in all of Hydaelyn who can create such a mystical masterpiece, and it is said he resides upon a misty peak hidden within the mountain ranges of Doma. Crafted by stitching together dozens of smaller clouds, the cumulus allows a single rider to explore the skies...but only if she has an inherent affinity for magicks.
mount.tooltip:
Mental note: pick no
quarrel with Domans.
- Thancred
